name: Knight of Pentacles
summary: Motion/Quest of Earth, focused action. Drive and journey, steer the force wisely.
flowText: Knight of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Drive and journey; steer the force wisely.

related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.
